---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What user or shop problem does this solve? Example: “Staff cannot see low stock while offline.”

## Proposed solution (optional)

How would you like it to work? Sketches, mockups, or example flows welcome.

## Alternatives considered (optional)

What else did you think of?

## Scope

- [ ] I am willing to help implement this in a pull request
- [ ] This is a small UI tweak
- [ ] This needs design discussion first

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, or references to similar apps.
